entities.name: LIVESTOCK PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of output from livestock, identified as a critical challenge in drylands.

entities.name: WATERSHED INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Strategies and actions implemented within a watershed to improve livelihoods, environmental security, and livestock productivity.

entities.name: PARASAI-SINDH WATERSHED
entities.description: The specific watershed area used as a case study in the research.

entities.name: BUNDELKHAND REGION
entities.description: The geographical region in Central India where the Parasai-Sindh watershed is located.

entities.name: CENTRAL INDIA
entities.description: The broader geographical area encompassing the Bundelkhand region.

entities.name: LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing the necessities of life, which are positively impacted by watershed-based interventions.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of being free from environmental threats, improved through watershed-based interventions.

entities.name: DRYLANDS
entities.description: Arid or semi-arid regions where increasing forage resources and livestock productivity is a critical challenge.

entities.name: FORAGE RESOURCES
entities.description: Plant materials available for livestock consumption.

entities.name: LIVESTOCK POPULATION
entities.description: The number and distribution of livestock in a given area, impacted by watershed interventions.

entities.name: FODDER RESOURCES
entities.description: Available feed for livestock, analyzed in the context of watershed interventions.

entities.name: BIOMASS AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of organic matter available, analyzed in the context of watershed interventions.

entities.name: LAND
entities.description: The terrestrial surface, part of the interrelationship between land, water, crop, and livestock.

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: The liquid resource, part of the interrelationship between land, water, crop, and livestock.

entities.name: CROP
entities.description: Plants grown for food or feed, part of the interrelationship between land, water, crop, and livestock.

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Domesticated animals, part of the interrelationship between land, water, crop, and livestock.

entities.name: FORAGE DEFICIT
entities.description: The gap between required and available forage for livestock, which can be bridged through watershed interventions.
